title: Stackables Items
description: You are able to stack items you weren't before!
body:
# Stackables Mod

The Stackables mod is a simple mod designed to make resource management easier! This mod adjusts the stack sizes of commonly limited items in the game, allowing all items to be stacked up to 64, including items that previously had lower stack limits. By increasing the stack size, it frees up inventory space, making exploration, mining, and building more efficient.

Ideal for players who want to focus more on gameplay and less on inventory juggling, Stackables seamlessly integrates into Minecraft without changing the core experience.
